title: Settings SearchResultTrampoline deep link URI parsing allows internal component launch
notes: When EXTRA_SHOW_FRAGMENT is empty, trampoline parses intent from EXTRA_SETTINGS_EMBEDDED_DEEP_LINK_INTENT_URI via Intent.parseUri(). SettingsHomepageActivity.launchDeepLinkIntentToRight() has validation (exported, permissions, caller UID), but SearchResultTrampoline does NOT perform equivalent validation when isAlreadyEmbedded() or when caller is not SettingsIntelligence. Parsed intent started with FLAG_ACTIVITY_FORWARD_RESULT. Can launch non-exported Settings components.
